======================================================================
  elibrary_cache.pkl  —  Structure & Reference Guide
  Author: Gerry Stahl     Updated: March 2026
======================================================================

OVERVIEW
--------
elibrary_cache.pkl is a Python pickle file containing an ElibraryCache
object (defined in cache/elibrary_cache.py).  It holds structured
metadata and full text for 22 academic books and their 337 chapters,
ready for embedding, chunking, summarization, and RAG querying.

Load with:
    import sys; sys.path.insert(0, '/Users/GStahl2/AI/elibrary')
    from cache.elibrary_cache import ElibraryCache
    cache = ElibraryCache.load('cache/elibrary_cache.pkl')

Save with:
    cache.save('cache/elibrary_cache.pkl')

STATISTICS  (March 2026)
------------------------
  Books              :  22
  Chapters (content) : 337
  Total words        : 2,053,079
  Total tokens       : 2,669,003  (approx., Qwen 2.5-7B tokenizer)
  Book summaries     :  22  (one per book, AI-generated)
  Chapter summaries  : 337  (one per chapter, AI-generated)


======================================================================
  CLASS HIERARCHY
======================================================================

  ElibraryCache
  └── books: List[Book]
        ├── [Book fields]
        ├── book_summaries: List[BookSummary]
        │     └── [BookSummary fields]
        └── book_chapters: List[Chapter]
              ├── [Chapter fields]
              └── chapter_summaries: List[ChapterSummary]
                    └── [ChapterSummary fields]


======================================================================
  ElibraryCache
======================================================================

  Field         Type          Description
  ------------- ------------- -----------------------------------------
  books         List[Book]    All 22 books, sorted by book_number.

  Methods
  -------
  .add_book(book)             Add a Book, keep list sorted.
  .get_book(number)           Return Book by number, or None.
  .get_book_by_name(name)     Return Book by PDF filename.
  .save(path=None)            Pickle to path (default: DEFAULT_PATH).
  .load(path=None)            Class method: unpickle and return cache.
  .summary_stats()            Return multi-line statistics string.

  Properties
  ----------
  .total_books                int — number of books
  .total_chapters             int — total content chapters (ch > 0)
  .total_words                int — sum of all chapter words


======================================================================
  Book
======================================================================

  Field                   Type              Description
  ----------------------- ----------------- ---------------------------
  book_number             int               Sequence number 1–22.
  book_name               str               PDF filename (e.g. "3.gc.pdf").
  book_title              str               Full title of the book.
  book_author             str               Primary author(s), semicolon-separated.
  book_keywords           List[str]         Subject keywords (may be empty).
  book_reference          str               APA-style citation for the book.
  book_text               str               Full book text (all chapters concatenated).
  book_number_of_pages    int               Total PDF pages.
  book_kind               str               Content type: sections | essays |
                                            chapters | papers | editorials |
                                            proposals | investigations.
  book_summaries          List[BookSummary] AI-generated whole-book summaries
                                            (usually 1 per book, ~500 words).
  book_chapters           List[Chapter]     All chapters incl. chapter 0 (book-
                                            level entry).  Sorted by chapter_number.

  Properties
  ----------
  .content_chapters       Chapters with chapter_number > 0 (excludes ch 0).
  .total_words            Sum of chapter_number_of_words for content chapters.
  .total_tokens           Sum of chapter_number_of_tokens for content chapters.

  Methods
  -------
  .add_chapter(chapter)   Append and re-sort by chapter_number.
  .get_chapter(number)    Return Chapter by number, or None.
  .add_summary(summary)   Append a BookSummary.
  .latest_summary()       Return most recent BookSummary, or None.


======================================================================
  BookSummary
======================================================================

  Field                       Type    Description
  --------------------------- ------- ------------------------------------
  book_summary_author         str     Model or human who wrote the summary
                                      (e.g. "Claude Sonnet 4.6").
  book_summary_date           str     ISO date string (e.g. "2026-03-01").
  book_summary_prompt         str     Full prompt used to generate it.
  book_summary_number_of_words int    Word count of summary_text.
  book_summary_text           str     The summary (~300–500 words).


======================================================================
  Chapter
======================================================================

  Note: chapter_number = 0 is a book-level metadata entry (not a real
  chapter).  Use book.content_chapters to skip it.

  Field                       Type                Description
  --------------------------- ------------------- ------------------------
  chapter_number              int                 Chapter index within the
                                                  book (1-based; 0 = book
                                                  entry).
  chapter_title               str                 Chapter or section title.
  chapter_author              str                 Author(s) if different from
                                                  book author.
  chapter_keywords            List[str]           Subject keywords.
  chapter_reference           str                 APA citation for the chapter.
  chapter_text                str                 Full chapter text (plain text,
                                                  extracted from PDF).
  chapter_number_of_pages     int                 Pages in this chapter.
  chapter_number_of_words     int                 Word count of chapter_text.
  chapter_number_of_tokens    int                 Token count (Qwen 2.5-7B
                                                  tokenizer; 0 if not computed).
  chapter_number_of_symbols   int                 Character count of chapter_text.
  chapter_summaries           List[ChapterSummary] AI-generated summaries
                                                  (usually 1 per chapter).

  Methods
  -------
  .add_summary(summary)       Append a ChapterSummary.
  .latest_summary()           Return most recent ChapterSummary, or None.
  .compute_metrics()          Derive word/symbol counts from chapter_text.


======================================================================
  ChapterSummary
======================================================================

  Field                           Type    Description
  ------------------------------- ------- --------------------------------
  chapter_summary_author          str     Model or human (e.g. "Claude Sonnet 4.6").
  chapter_summary_date            str     ISO date string.
  chapter_summary_prompt          str     Full prompt used.
  chapter_summary_number_of_words int     Word count of summary_text.
  chapter_summary_text            str     The summary (~100–300 words).


======================================================================
  BOOK INVENTORY  (22 books, 337 chapters)
======================================================================

   #   PDF file              Kind           Chapters    Words    Title
  ---  --------------------  -------------  --------  ---------  -----
   1   1.marx.pdf            sections           12      75,737   Marx and Heidegger
   2   2.tacit.pdf           sections           15     130,818   Tacit and Explicit Understanding in Computer Support
   3   3.gc.pdf              papers             25     191,623   Group Cognition: Computer Support for Building Collaborative Knowledge
   4   4.svmt.pdf            papers             34     241,480   Studying Virtual Math Teams
   5   5.euclid.pdf          chapters           11      73,836   Translating Euclid: Designing a Human-Centered Mathematics
   6   6.analysis.pdf        chapters           13      93,105   Constructing Dynamic Triangles Together: The Development of…
   7   7.philosophy.pdf      essays             21      77,987   Essays in Social Philosophy
   8   8.software.pdf        essays             18     102,381   Essays in Personalizable Software
   9   9.cscl.pdf            essays             12      69,377   Essays in Computer-Supported Collaborative Learning
  10   10.science.pdf        essays             11      86,346   Essays in Group-Cognitive Science
  11   11.theory.pdf         essays             15     148,169   Essays in Philosophy of Group Cognition
  12   12.math.pdf           essays              8      66,501   Essays in Online Mathematics Interaction
  13   13.dynamic.pdf        essays             10      48,642   Essays in Collaborative Dynamic Geometry
  14   14.topics.pdf         sections            4      62,910   Adventures in Dynamic Geometry
  15   15.global.pdf         sections            8      54,197   Global Introduction to CSCL
  16   16.ijcscl.pdf         editorials         39     102,602   Editorial Introductions to ijCSCL
  17   17.proposals.pdf      proposals          18     123,910   Proposals for Research
  18   18.overview.pdf       chapters           18      67,571   Overview and Autobiographical Essays
  19   19.investigations.pdf investigations     15     146,092   Theoretical Investigations: Philosophical Foundations of Group Cognition
  20   20.form.pdf           chapters            7      31,010   Works of 3-D Form
  21   21.game.pdf           sections           11      27,972   Dynamic Geometry Game for Pods
  22   22.climate.pdf        chapters           12      30,813   Studying Climate Locally: The Future of Chatham's Marsh
                                              -------  ---------
                             TOTAL            337    2,053,079


======================================================================
  COMPANION FILE: editorials_cache.pkl
======================================================================

  Defined in: cache/editorials_cache.py

  Stores 79 editorial introductions to ijCSCL (2006–2025) with
  3-level summarization hierarchy (Claude / GPT-4o / GitHub Copilot):

    EditorialsCache
    ├── editorials: List[Editorial]       # 79 per-issue editorials
    ├── annual_summaries: List[AnnualSummary]  # 20 per-year summaries
    └── total_history: TotalHistory       # 1 full 20-year synthesis

  Each of the three dataclasses (Editorial, AnnualSummary, TotalHistory)
  carries three parallel EditorialSummary slots:
    .summary        — Claude (Anthropic)
    .summary_gpt4o  — GPT-4o (OpenAI)
    .summary_book   — GitHub Copilot

  Editorial fields: year, volume, issue, title, author, words, text, pdf


======================================================================
  CHUNKING PIPELINE  (planned — not yet stored in cache)
======================================================================

  When chapters are chunked, each chunk will be a dict:

    {
        "text":     "<chunk text>",
        "metadata": {
            "book_number":    int,   # 1–22
            "chapter_number": int,   # 1-based
            "chunk_index":    int,   # 0-based within chapter
            "char_start":     int,   # byte offset in chapter_text
            "char_end":       int,
            "word_count":     int,
            # optional extras: book_title, chapter_title, …
        }
    }

  Chunker:  chunkers/semantic_chunker.py :: TextChunker
            (RecursiveCharacterTextSplitter, default 1000 chars / 200 overlap)

  Embedder: embedders/embedder.py :: Embedder
            (HuggingFace all-MiniLM-L6-v2, 384-dim vectors)


======================================================================
  FILE LOCATIONS
======================================================================

  Cache PKL    cache/elibrary_cache.pkl
  Cache JSON   cache/elibrary_cache.json     (text fields truncated to 10 words)
  Cache class  cache/elibrary_cache.py
  This file    cache/cache_structure.txt

  Editorials PKL   cache/editorials_cache.pkl
  Editorials JSON  cache/editorials_cache.json
  Editorials class cache/editorials_cache.py

  Chunker      chunkers/semantic_chunker.py
  Hier.chunker chunkers/semantic_hierarchical_chunker.py
  Embedder     embedders/embedder.py
  PDF parser   parsers/pdf_parser.py
